name: Erina Pendleton
alt_names: エリナ・ペンドルトン
description:
Erina is a young girl from [Jonathan Joestar](https://anilist.co/character/8087/)'s hometown. ~!She becomes his love interest then wife. She is the mother to [George Joestar II](https://anilist.co/character/130262/), and the grandmother and guardian to [Joseph Joestar](https://anilist.co/character/6356/).!~

(Source: JoJo Wikia)
